blocks.body: Past Continuous: pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi — Was I...?, Was she...?, Were they...? i krótkie odpowiedzi.

{"level":"A2","intro":"W pytaniach w Past Continuous forma was / were przechodzi przed podmiot, a główny czasownik zostaje w formie -ing.","rules":[{"label":"Was I / he / she / it ...?","color":"emerald","text":"Z I / he / she / it zaczynaj pytanie od was.","example":"Was she sleeping at 10 p.m.?"},{"label":"Were you / we / they ...?","color":"blue","text":"Z you / we / they używaj were przed podmiotem.","example":"Were they waiting outside?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"W krótkich odpowiedziach powtarzaj was / were albo wasn't / weren't.","example":"Yes, I was. / No, they weren't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele pytań","intro":"W pytaniu forma be stoi przed podmiotem.","items":[{"label":"I / he / she / it","title":"Was ... + verb-ing?","subtitle":"Was I talking too fast? / Was he sleeping?"},{"label":"you / we / they","title":"Were ... + verb-ing?","subtitle":"Were you working then? / Were they waiting for us?"},{"label":"Yes","title":"Yes, ... was / were.","subtitle":"Yes, I was. / Yes, they were."},{"label":"No","title":"No, ... wasn't / weren't.","subtitle":"No, she wasn't. / No, we weren't."}]}

{"title":"2. Do czego służą te pytania","sections":[{"label":"Czynność w tamtym momencie","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj, co działo się w określonym momencie w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"Was he studying at 8 p.m.?","ua":"Pytanie o czynność trwającą wtedy."},{"en":"Were they sleeping when you called?","ua":"Pytanie o dłuższą czynność w przeszłości."}]},{"label":"Tło dla innego zdarzenia","color":"blue","description":"Pytaj o dłuższą czynność, która była tłem dla innego zdarzenia.","examples":[{"en":"Was she cooking when you came in?","ua":"Pytanie o czynność w tle."},{"en":"Were you driving when it started to rain?","ua":"Jedna dłuższa czynność i jedno zdarzenie."}]},{"label":"Krótkie odpowiedzi","color":"amber","description":"Nie powtarzaj całego zdania. Krótka odpowiedź z was / were wystarczy.","examples":[{"en":"Was he working then? — Yes, he was.","ua":"Was he working then? — Yes, he was."},{"en":"Were they waiting? — No, they weren't.","ua":"Were they waiting? — No, they weren't."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Pytanie i krótka odpowiedź","intro":"W odpowiedzi powtarzaj was / were, a nie całe zdanie.","rows":[{"en":"Was she sleeping at 10 p.m.?","ua":"Yes, she was. / No, she wasn't.","note":"was → was / wasn't"},{"en":"Were they waiting outside?","ua":"Yes, they were. / No, they weren't.","note":"were → were / weren't"},{"en":"Were you studying when I called?","ua":"Yes, I was. / No, I wasn't.","note":"Na Were you...? często odpowiadamy I was / I wasn't."}],"warning":"Nie mów Did she was sleeping? ani Yes, they did."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Dodawanie did do Past Continuous.","wrong":"❌ Did she was sleeping?","right":"✅ Was she sleeping?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Zostawianie was / were po podmiocie jak w twierdzeniu.","wrong":"❌ They were waiting outside?","right":"✅ Were they waiting outside?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Używanie did w krótkiej odpowiedzi.","wrong":"❌ Yes, they did.","right":"✅ Yes, they were."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytanie w Past Continuous = was / were + subject + verb-ing.","Z I / he / she / it zaczynaj od Was...?","Z you / we / they zaczynaj od Were...?","W krótkich odpowiedziach powtarzaj was / were: Yes, I was. / No, they weren't."]}
